evidence.text:
108submissions
Finished
Guy Falls Asleep At Work, The Internet Takes Him On Photoshop Adventures
The idea of sleeping at work may sound romantic, but it's not. And one guy, known as TheOrangeDuke, learned it the hard way when he fell into a deep sleep on the second day of his office job at a tech startup.
To make things worse (or better?) it didn't go unnoticed by his associates - they decided to cherish the moment by posing with the fallen victim for an office prank. And, as it happens in modern times, the picture was posted on the Internet with an invitation to the so-called Photoshop Battle. People responded and took the sleeping beauty to numerous photo manipulation adventures.
And now you can also be a part of it - vote for the edits or upload your own Photoshopped images!
More info: reddit (h/t: The Huffington Post)
So this guy fell asleep on his second day at work...
Image credits: TheOrangeDukeThis post may include affiliate links.

His peers seems to be a******s. Mocking about a trainee and harming his further career. Great. (Sorry, my english, I am not native.)
Honestly, I think I'd rather have my coworkers make a joke out of it than to take it so serious if I fell asleep! I'd feel a lot more comfortable instead of them getting upset with me. He still has his job, so it was obviously all in good fun.
Load More Replies...umm ever heard of narcolepsy? I have it, and have fallen asleep just about everywhere including the first day on a new job. On average it takes 10 years to get an official diagnosis, took me nearly 20! maybe this dude is like me, not aware there is something seriously wrong.

evidence.page_title: 18 Moments When People Fell Asleep in Unexpected Places
evidence.title: 18 Moments When People Fell Asleep in Unexpected Places
evidence.description: Discover 18 hilarious photos of public nap champions who can sleep anywhere. From subway acrobats to office innovators, these sleepers are legendary.
evidence.text:
There is a hidden superpower possessed by a select few individuals that allows them to find deep, restorative sleep in environments that would give the rest of us a permanent neck ache. Whether it’s a crowded commuter train at rush hour or a noisy construction site, these “nap champions” have mastered the art of shutting out the world at a moment’s notice. It is a staggering display of biological surrender, where the body simply decides that a hard plastic chair or a cold marble floor is the perfect place to recharge. For these people, the need for sleep isn’t just a suggestion; it’s an inevitable force that can strike in the most inconvenient (and often hilarious) locations imaginable.
The comedy found in these public displays of slumber lies in the gravity-defying positions the human body can assume when the brain checks out. We’ve all seen the subway rider who manages to stay upright while catching some Z’s, but the true professionals are the ones who find a way to curl up inside a luggage rack or balance their entire body on two chairs without waking up. Watching people achieve total unconsciousness in the middle of a chaotic public square is a reminder of our shared human vulnerability and the sheer lengths we will go to for ten minutes of shut-eye. We’ve rounded up eighteen of the most impressive displays of public napping that prove that when you’re tired enough, the entire world becomes a mattress.
1. Construction site? Not a problem
2. That’s gonna hurt later
3. He was testing the chairs, and they are definitely comfortable
4. How is that humanly possible?
5. Her ability to sleep anywhere made her a meme
Trending on The Scroller
6. He’s enjoying the silence
7. Caught sleeping on the job
8. This made everyone’s day at the office
Sign up for our newsletter
9. Looks like he thought this carefully
10. He’s building up character
11. Nobody is bothering her there
12. “How did the study session go?”
13. Waking up will be hard
14. Sleeping level: Jedi
15. The nap master is among us
16. Let’s pray that the train doesn’t stop suddenly
17. That book is GOOD
18. There’s never a bench too short when a good nap is approaching
Want more human funny moments?
Witnessing these masters of sleep navigate the world with their eyes closed is a hilarious reminder that sometimes, the pillow of choice is simply whatever is closest to your head. While we might laugh at their awkward poses, there’s a small part of us that envies their ability to find peace in the middle of a storm. If you enjoyed this gallery, don’t miss these 18 Hilarious Moments Kids Fell Asleep in the Weirdest Places, or 18 Vintage 1800s Photos That Prove People Were Unserious. You may also enjoy these 18 Funny Shirts That Absolutely Nail The Joke.
